_note: Override file for HDB carparks with explicit time-banded MANUAL rate_rows (cap disabled). Intentionally EMPTY.
_status: CONFIRMED NOT APPLICABLE (2026-05-31). Web-verified against HDB's current Short Term Parking pages: HDB has NO general short-term peak/time-of-day rate restructuring for normal car lots. The only HDB time-differentiated scheme is Loading/Unloading Bay (LUB) pricing (first 15 min free, then $2 / $4 per ½hr) at selected bays — which this app does not model. The earlier 'post-2022 Central hike' note conflated this with URA's separate changes and/or the long-standing Central-Area Mon–Sat 07:00–17:00 $1.20 band (now correctly modelled in hdb-rates.ts directly).
_keptBecause: Dormant infrastructure: if HDB ever publishes a per-carpark peak-rate annex, populate `carparks` here and the rule engine picks it up on the next `npm run migrate:hdb-rates` run. Empty list → all carparks use the standard tier.
